summary: First GX matching/prep pass that reorganized Dolphin GX/OS assembly data into include files, added decomp.me scratch links and starter headers for GX FIFO/init/misc and OS thread/context helpers, removed unused global declarations, and adjusted a FIFO allocation symbol name. The PR appears mostly infrastructure-oriented for future matching rather than a large C decompilation landing; evidence comes from the PR body and diff, with no review comments.

key_files.role: new extracted GX data/jump-table include; largest addition at 453 lines
assembly cleanup with many removed .global labels and added decomp.me link/signature comments
removed many global directives from GX attribute assembly
now includes OSContext.inc and adds decomp.me scratch link before OSSaveContext
now includes OSThread.inc and adds decomp.me scratch links for OSGetCurrentThread and OSWakeupThread
new starter GX FIFO header with private structs/prototypes/externs
new starter GX init header wiring PPCArch, GXFifo, and GXMisc includes
new starter GX misc header with GXPixModeSync and __GXPEInit declarations
updated include guard, GQR register macros, and typed PPC HID2/Halt prototypes
removed stale placeholder declarations for PPC, GXFifo, OSContext/OSThread, and HSD FIFO symbols

what_changed: Added several decomp.me scratch links directly in assembly, including GX func_8033E78C, GXFifo, GXMisc, OSContext OSSaveContext, and OSThread OSGetCurrentThread/OSWakeupThread locations.
Moved data sections out of monolithic assembly files into separate .inc files under include/dolphin/gx and include/dolphin/os, notably GX.inc, GXFifo.inc, GXInit.inc, OSContext.inc, and OSThread.inc.
Added `.include "dolphin/os/OSContext.inc"` and `.include "dolphin/os/OSThread.inc"` at the top of the corresponding assembly files after macros.inc.
Removed many `.global` directives for internal labels and apparent non-exported helper functions in GX assembly, reducing symbol pollution while preserving labels for jumps and tables.

Created initial source-side GX headers: src/dolphin/gx/GXFifo.h, GXInit.h, and GXMisc.h, including private placeholder structs such as __GXFifoObj, __GXGPFifo, __GXFifoLinkObj, and externs for FIFO-related globals.
Created src/dolphin/os/OSThread.h with OSGetCurrentThread and OSWakeupThread declarations and added OSSaveContext to include/dolphin/os/OSContext.h.
Cleaned include/functions.h by deleting unused placeholder declarations for PPC architecture helpers, GX FIFO routines, OS context/thread routines, and HSD_AllocateFIFO.

Updated src/dolphin/base/PPCArch.h by changing the include guard to _DOLPHIN_PPCARCH_H_, adding GQR0-GQR7 register constants, and narrowing exposed prototypes to PPCHalt, PPCMfhid2, and PPCMthid2 with types.
Removed include/dolphin/base/PPCArch.h contents, suggesting consolidation toward the src/dolphin/base/PPCArch.h header in this slice.
Renamed HSD_AllocateFIFO to HSD_AllocateFifo in src/sysdolphin/baselib/initialize.c and initialize.h, and updated the call in src/melee/gm/gmmain.c.
smart_moves: Extracting assembly data sections into .inc files made the PR body's stated workflow easier: data can be copied into decomp.me separately from text, while the original assembly still assembles through explicit includes.

Removing unused or overly broad `.global` declarations helps distinguish true exported symbols from branch labels and local helpers, improving future symbol hygiene and reducing noise in matching work.

Starter headers provided just enough structure, prototypes, and externs for GX-related matching without pretending all field names were known; placeholder names like unk0 and filler preserve layout evidence while avoiding false precision.
Moving stale unknown declarations out of include/functions.h reduced global catch-all header dependence and pushed declarations toward subsystem headers.
Adding decomp.me URLs beside exact assembly targets creates a durable breadcrumb trail for future contributors to resume matching specific functions.
decomp_lessons: For large SDK subsystems like GX, first passes can be valuable even without full C conversion: isolate data, add precise headers, prune globals, and annotate active scratches.
Keep data/jump tables in separate includes when they obstruct decomp.me iteration, but include them from the assembly file so section order and labels remain controlled.
Use subsystem headers instead of accumulating placeholder declarations in include/functions.h; this makes later type refinement local to the relevant Dolphin module.
When struct layouts are only partially understood, preserve offsets with filler arrays and private placeholder structs rather than guessing semantic field names.
Symbol cleanup is part of matching: removing `.global` from internal labels clarifies which labels are actual API/decomp targets and which are compiler artifacts or jump-table destinations.
naming_conventions: Renamed `HSD_AllocateFIFO` to `HSD_AllocateFifo`, indicating mixed-case `Fifo` spelling was preferred for this HSD symbol in this PR.
New private/internal GX structs used double-underscore prefixes, such as `__GXFifoObj`, `__GXGPFifo`, `__GXFifoLinkObj`, and `__GXFifoLinkDataContainer`.
Unknown fields in new placeholder structs used `unk0`, `unk4`, `unk8`, etc., with offset comments like `// base`, `// end`, or `// x00` where evidence was available.
The PPCArch include guard changed from `_PPCARCH_H_` to `_DOLPHIN_PPCARCH_H_`, matching a more namespaced Dolphin header guard style.
Gekko quantization register constants were named `GQR0` through `GQR7`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added inline decomp.me scratch comments immediately before target functions; one GX example also included a tentative signature comment: `s32 func_8033E78C(u16, u16, u32, u8, u8)`.
Moved `.section .data` blocks, strings, constants, and jump tables into `.inc` files to simplify copy-pasting into decomp.me.
Kept data includes in assembly files via `.include` directives so extracted data remains part of the build without duplicating it in the main `.s` body.
Removed `.global` from many labels like `lbl_8033DF10` and jump-table case labels while leaving label definitions intact, a useful approach when labels are only internal branch targets.
Preserved alignment directives such as `.balign 8` and `.balign 4` in extracted data includes, which is important for matching data layout.
Declared only minimal function prototypes and externs needed by new GX/OS headers, avoiding over-broad declarations in global headers.

review_feedback.note: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully match GX functions annotated with decomp.me links from PR 439.
Search for subsequent renames or field refinements of __GXFifoObj and __GXGPFifo.
Check whether include/dolphin/base/PPCArch.h removal/consolidation was later reversed or expanded.
Look for later PRs that replace GX.inc jump tables or data labels with typed C data.
Search for HSD_AllocateFifo to confirm spelling convention across baselib and game-mode code.
